div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Cuba (Beaulac)
div.p: 77. Your No. 117, October 19, 1 p.m. In view of the discussions now in progress here between the Cuban Ambassador and the Under Secretary, I do not believe that any further exposition of the position of this Government by the Embassy is necessary or would be desirable at this juncture. You should accordingly avoid for the moment further conversations, on the subject of the specific questions under discussion here, with officials of the Cuban Government, and should such conversations be proposed by the latter I prefer that you courteously suggest that they do not appear to be required in the light of the Washington discussions.
